title: ADP vs BigCommerce
description: Compare ADP vs BigCommerce — a hr & people platform versus a finance & accounting solution. Find out which tool better suits your workflow.
verdict: ADP (HR & People) and BigCommerce (Finance & Accounting) serve different primary purposes. BigCommerce has a higher user rating, but the right choice depends on whether your priority is hr & people or finance & accounting capabilities.

faqs.question: What is the difference between ADP and BigCommerce?
faqs.answer: ADP is a hr & people tool, while BigCommerce is a finance & accounting platform. They serve different primary functions but may overlap in certain areas.

faqs.question: Can ADP replace BigCommerce?
faqs.answer: Not directly — they serve different categories. Some organizations use both for different purposes.

faqs.question: Which has better value, ADP or BigCommerce?
faqs.answer: ADP (Custom) and BigCommerce ($39 – $399/mo) have different pricing. Evaluate based on which category matters more for your workflows.
